sections.paragraph: i.q. Syr. ܐܳܦܰܕܢܳܐ palace, Dan 11:45, אָֽהֳלֵי אַפֵּדְנֹו “his tabernacles, like unto palaces.” It is the Arab. فَذَنُ high tower, fortress, castle, with the prefix of Aleph prosthetic, followed by Dagesh forte, comp. אַפִּדְיֹון, and Ch. דָּם, אֲדַם, אַדַּם blood, גַּן, אֲגַן, אַגַּן garden.
